name: My Stupid Boss: The Animated Series
original_name: My Stupid Boss: The Animated Series
overview: Kerani hopes to escape Bosman's chaos after being transferred to a branch office in a small Sarawak town, but his hopes are quickly shattered as the turmoil persists.
